text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, do you have a minute? 
Thing is, I have a test tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But today, I realized that I messed up, 
and the material I've been studying 
won't be on the test.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: So you know what I have to do now, right?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yep! Go right into the test with 
no preparation! Problem solved!!
